news.title: Alkem Labs sees Rs 930 crore block deal as promoter family entities pare stake; Goldman, Morgan Stanley among key buyers
news.description: Alkem Laboratories shares experienced significant block deals totaling Rs 930 crore. Promoter family entities divested shares to a group of domestic mutual funds and foreign institutional investors. This transaction occurred after a strong performance by Alkem Laboratories shares over the past year.

news.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Wednesday
news.description: Indian benchmark indices ended higher after a volatile session, with late buying in heavyweight IT stocks lifting sentiment. Sensex gained 382 points and Nifty closed above 23,480, while investors tracked monsoon progress, inflation trends, RBI policy outlook and liquidity conditions.

news.title: Iran Halts Talks With US and Threatens Full Hormuz Closure
news.description: Iran said it would suspend negotiations with the US in protest for Israel’s offensive in Lebanon, escalating tensions at a time when Washington and Tehran have been working on the terms of an interim peace deal.
